section: P1.9 Qdrant Hot-Path And Contention Audit
verbatim: Measured baseline (2026-07-12, Qdrant 1.18.0, largest active corpus):

section: P1.9 Qdrant Hot-Path And Contention Audit
verbatim: Warm dense child search at k=85: about 6 ms p50 without payload and about 14 ms p50 with the full payload; 30-run p95 stayed below 20 ms.

section: P1.9 Qdrant Hot-Path And Contention Audit
verbatim: Full payload transfer was about 292 KB for 85 hits; a bounded payload selector reduced it to about 148 KB.

section: P1.9 Qdrant Hot-Path And Contention Audit
verbatim: Qdrant used 6.63/8 GiB (82.9%) with no optimizer job active.

section: P1.9 Qdrant Hot-Path And Contention Audit
verbatim: The node held 59 collections / about 2.67M vector representations, including 37 empty collections and non-active nonempty collections.
